title: No Netherite Revamp
body:
Ever wanted a challenge? Or maybe you just hate netherite (Like me :))

Well, this DataPack is Perfect for you!!!

**How does it work?**

- Any ancient debris that gets close to you becomes netherrack.
- Anything related to netherite will be deleted from your Inventory.

**Can I put it on an already-generated world?**

Yes! But please note that any netherite armor, tools, etc., will be deleted!

**How to install:**

1. Extract the zip file.
2. Drag and drop the file into your world's datapack's folder.

**Extra Notes:**

- I have not yet made a new recipe for duplicating smithing templates (Im kinda new to coding).
